positive: A whimsical illustration of a glowing forest clearing at twilight. Tiny bioluminescent mushrooms illuminate the scene, and a miniature, ethereal fox is sitting on a bed of moss. Highly detailed, storybook style, deep emerald and sapphire color palette, volumetric lighting, digital painting, concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, oversaturation, harsh shadows
